heading: Appointment and term of service of Librarian of Congress
label: 136–1 Appointment and term of service of Librarian of Congress

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The President shall appoint the Librarian of Congress, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate.

children.heading: Term of service
children.label: b Term of service
children.text: The Librarian of Congress shall be appointed for a term of 10 years.

children.heading: Reappointment
children.label: c Reappointment
children.text: An individual appointed to the position of Librarian of Congress, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate, may be reappointed to that position in accordance with subsections (a) and (b).

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: d Effective date
children.text: This section shall apply with respect to appointments made on or after .November 5, 2015
